headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Quest Diagnostics, Raises Price Target to $220
summary: UBS  analyst Kevin Caliendo   maintains Quest Diagnostics (NYSE:DGX) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $210 to $220.

headline: DGX Q1 Deep Dive: Organic Growth, Consumer Testing Momentum, and Advanced Diagnostics Drive Outlook
summary: Healthcare diagnostics company Quest Diagnostics (NYSE:DGX) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 9.2% year on year to $2.90 billion. The company’s full-year revenue guidance of $11.84 billion at the midpoint came in 0.7% above analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.50 per share was 5.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: How The Investment Story For Quest Diagnostics (DGX) Is Quietly Shifting Now
summary: Quest Diagnostics is back in focus after a slight trim to its modeled fair value, with the price target adjusted to $218.19 from $218.50, a change of about 0.1%. That small move comes alongside a mix of bullish and bearish analyst updates, including new targets and a fresh list inclusion that signal active debate around where the stock should trade. Ahead, you will see how to interpret these shifting targets and keep up with the evolving analyst narrative around Quest. Stay updated as the...
